checklist.description: Answer resolves to the gated GitHub write path using `GH_TOKEN=$(moltnet github token --credentials ...) gh ...` or a clearly equivalent agent-token flow
checklist.name: Authenticated GitHub write path

checklist.description: Answer anchors credential resolution to repo-root or GIT_CONFIG_GLOBAL context rather than an ad-hoc cached absolute binary path
checklist.name: Credential path anchored correctly

checklist.description: Answer does not propose plain unauthenticated `gh pr create` for the agent write action when the agent GitHub app path is applicable
checklist.name: No plain unauthenticated gh write

checklist.description: If authenticated GitHub-write prerequisites are missing, the answer fails closed with an explicit requirement instead of guessing
checklist.name: Fail closed on missing prerequisites

checklist.description: No actual PR creation or push side effect occurs while answering the routing question
checklist.name: No write side effect

checklist.description: The answer is concrete enough to run later: it shows the command shape, not only vague prose about authentication
checklist.name: Concrete command shape

context: Routing scenario: LeGreffier should prefer the authenticated GitHub write path for PR work and avoid unauthenticated or guessed command flows.
